title: Angel Numbering
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Angel Numbering             Quote Post by Yue » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:22 pm Wait, okay, so. The Twelfth Angel is the one inside Eva-06. The Thirteenth Angel is Kaworu. Cool. I get that. But Zeruel was the Tenth Angel. There's one missing, isn't there?

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:24 pm The eleventh is missing. I got my money on it being Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:38 pm There's 14 years of difference. I'm honestly not surprised if we missed one. Still, given what data we have access to there's not a lot we can go off. Maybe it's the Wunder?

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Mon Jan 14, 2013 10:43 pm Lance of LoL wrote: There's 14 years of difference. I'm honestly not surprised if we missed one. Still, given what data we have access to there's not a lot we can go off. Maybe it's the Wunder?

[]:             Quote Post by Philos » Tue Jan 15, 2013 2:01 am Here is my own made angels numbering chart. Edited from old chart which made by someone in 2ch.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 15, 2013 4:14 am Given the implied link between Wunder and the "Adams' Vessel" Mark.09, I doubt Wunder has anything to do with the 11th Angel. It seems far more likely to me that the 11th Angel was captured a la Tunniel and became the basis for the weaponized, mass-produced Mk.4 series.

[]:             Quote Post by Orizon » Tue Jan 15, 2013 2:05 pm Philos wrote: Here is my own made angels numbering chart. Edited from old chart which made by someone in 2ch.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 15, 2013 2:18 pm Orizon wrote: skeleton? in what movie does that one make an appearance?

[]:             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Tue Jan 15, 2013 8:10 pm if Asuka was an angel wouldnt it make more sense that they would have killed her already? even if she has angel dna in her eye or something it dosent mean she an angel. Rei has plenty of angel similarities but shes not considered a full on angel

[]:             Quote Post by Shamelessnomad » Wed Jan 16, 2013 6:52 am Forgive me if I am wrong, but isn't the nemesis series an angel or collection of angel-like entities?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 16, 2013 6:54 am Shamelessnomad wrote: Forgive me if I am wrong, but isn't the nemesis series an angel or collection of angel-like entities?

[]:             Quote Post by Shamelessnomad » Wed Jan 16, 2013 7:12 am Ah, thanks for the tip

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jan 16, 2013 8:06 am UBERGEEKZILLA wrote: if Asuka was an angel wouldnt it make more sense that they would have killed her already? even if she has angel dna in her eye or something it dosent mean she an angel. Rei has plenty of angel similarities but shes not considered a full on angel

[]:             Quote Post by andreh » Wed Jan 16, 2013 9:10 am And this guy? It's an angel?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jan 16, 2013 9:12 am Apparently one of the Nemesis Series, Mark 04C.

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Sun Feb 10, 2013 9:23 pm When was it decided that there are only 13 Angels? I've only watched the camrip of 3.0 once, so maybe I missed that Kaworu, the 13th, was said to be the last? I ask because, watching 1.11 last night, Gendo says something to the effect of, "If we're successful (at destroying the 6th Angel), there are still eight left." Wouldn't that make it 14?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Feb 10, 2013 10:52 pm Merkaba wrote: When was it decided that there are only 13 Angels? I've only watched the camrip of 3.0 once, so maybe I missed that Kaworu, the 13th, was said to be the last? I ask because, watching 1.11 last night, Gendo says something to the effect of, "If we're successful (at destroying the 6th Angel), there are still eight left." Wouldn't that make it 14?

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Mon Feb 11, 2013 10:48 am Merkaba wrote: When was it decided that there are only 13 Angels? I've only watched the camrip of 3.0 once, so maybe I missed that Kaworu, the 13th, was said to be the last? I ask because, watching 1.11 last night, Gendo says something to the effect of, "If we're successful (at destroying the 6th Angel), there are still eight left." Wouldn't that make it 14?

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Mon Feb 11, 2013 11:21 am You guys are ignoring the line I quoted. Gendo says after they defeat the SIXTH, there are still EIGHT more. That makes FOURTEEN.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Feb 11, 2013 11:39 am Ending up with Shinji, then? Seriously, though, am I alone in finding that the separation of the concepts of angel and not-angel is much less clear in Rebuild than in the series? Not least with things like the Nemesis series and the Wunder being around. For me this makes it much harder to understand the significance of the angels at all.
